options.name: -cell
options.description: Specifies a pointer to a library cell. ((libCell/ptnCell|vCell|topCell), optional)

options.name: -d
options.description: User specified values and return values are in database units: default is um

options.name: -globalPt
options.description: Specifies the global coordinates to convert into local coordinates, a pt {x y}, rect {xl yl xu yu} or list of pts and/or rects {{x1 y1} {x2 y2} {xl yl xu yu} ...} inside design

options.name: -hinst
options.description: Specifies the hierarchical instance of a database object. ((hInst), optional)

options.name: -inst
options.description: Specifies an instance/bump of a cell in the design. ((inst|bump), optional)

options.name: -localPt
options.description: Specifies the local coordinates to convert into global coordinates, a pt {x y}, rect {xl yl xu yu} or list of pts and/or rects {{x1 y1} {x2 y2} {xl yl xu yu} ...} inside cell

options.name: -orient
options.description: {R0 R90 R180 R270 MX MX90 MY MY90} Specifies the orientation of the cell specified with -cell.

options.name: -pt
options.description: Specifies the coordinates for the cell specified with -cell.
